backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores crop disease prediction records in a map, exposing functions to add a record, retrieve by ID, and filter by farmer session ID.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (PWA design, camera capture, TensorFlow.js inference, results screen) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing one-sentence summaries for App.tsx, History.tsx, and Results.tsx describing their routing setup, data fetching, and UI responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes (backgrounds, foregrounds, chart colors, sidebar tokens).
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the FarmGuard AI PWA, setting viewport meta tags, theme color, PWA manifest link, and mounting the React app at the #root div.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for FarmGuard AI defining name, theme/background colors, standalone display mode, icon paths, and app categories.
frontend/public/service-worker.js: Service worker that pre-caches static assets on install, cleans old caches on activate, and applies network-first for weather API calls and cache-first for the app shell.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that creates a TanStack Router with four typed routes (home, scan, results, history), wraps them in LanguageProvider and Layout, and registers the router for TypeScript type safety.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: Dropdown component using shadcn Select that lets users switch the app language among English, Kannada, Hindi, and Telugu via the LanguageContext.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component rendering a sticky header with logo and language selector, a bottom navigation bar for Home/Scan/History routes, and an offline indicator banner.
frontend/src/components/OfflineIndicator: Small banner component that listens to browser online/offline events and displays a warning strip with a WifiOff icon when the device loses connectivity.
frontend/src/components/WeatherRiskBanne: React component that fetches weather data using geolocation and displays a risk banner with temperature, humidity, and high-risk warnings, including offline/cached state handling.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: React context provider that manages the app's active language (en/kn/hi/te), persists the selection to localStorage, and exposes a translation function `t`.
frontend/src/data/disease-recommendation: Static JSON dataset containing organic treatments, chemical treatments, fertilizer recommendations, pesticide guidance, and prevention tips for crop diseases like Tomato Late Blight, Rice Blast, and Wheat Rust.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and provider that manage Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Custom hooks wrapping React Query for fetching scan history by session ID, adding a prediction record, and retrieving a single prediction by ID via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/i18n/en.json: English translation strings for all UI keys in the FarmGuard AI app, covering navigation, camera, results, history, weather, and settings.
frontend/src/i18n/hi.json: Hindi translation strings for all UI keys in the FarmGuard AI app, mirroring the structure of the English locale file.
frontend/src/i18n/kn.json: Kannada language translation file for the FarmGuard AI app, containing UI strings for navigation, camera, results, history, and weather features.
frontend/src/i18n/te.json: Telugu language translation file for the FarmGuard AI app, containing the same set of UI strings as the Kannada file but in Telugu.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines an agriculture-themed OKLCH color palette with light/dark mode CSS custom properties and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CameraCapture.tsx: Camera capture page component that handles live camera streaming, photo capture, file upload, image quality checking, and triggers AI disease prediction before navigating to results.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: History page that fetches and displays past disease scan records from the backend, sorted by timestamp, with confidence badges and navigation to detailed results.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component featuring a hero image, scan CTA button, weather risk banner, and a 'How It Works' feature grid with localized text.
frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx: Results page that displays crop disease detection output including disease name, confidence score, and treatment recommendations fetched from local JSON data. Also saves the prediction to the backend with weather data and supports text-to-speech playback in multiple languages.
frontend/src/utils/session.ts: Provides a persistent farmer session ID stored in localStorage, generating a new BigInt timestamp-based ID if none exists.
frontend/src/utils/speech-synthesis.ts: Wraps the Web Speech API to speak text in supported Indian languages (English, Kannada, Hindi, Telugu) with voice matching and exposes start/stop/status helpers.
frontend/src/utils/tfjs-model.ts: Demo-mode disease detection module that simulates model loading and inference by selecting from a fixed set of predictions based on image brightness, with an image quality checker.
frontend/src/utils/weather-api.ts: Fetches current weather from OpenWeatherMap (or returns demo data if no API key is set), caches results in localStorage for 30 minutes, and exposes a high-disease-risk helper.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom agriculture-themed color palette (leaf green, amber, soil brown, etc.) using OKLCH variables, custom fonts, border radii, and enabling typography, container queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the FarmGuard AI PWA's architecture, existing features, known issues, and image requirements for build planning and continuity tracking.
